prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
# The Octopus Who Hid in Plain Sight

Deep beneath the sparkling waves, where the coral grew in colors that had no names and tiny fish darted like living confetti, there lived an octopus named Ollie. Ollie had eight wonderful arms, two bright curious eyes, and one very big problem — whenever another creature swam close enough to say hello, Ollie turned the color of whatever was nearby and disappeared. Against the pink coral, Ollie turned pink. Against the gray rock, Ollie turned gray. Against the waving green seaweed, well, you can probably guess. It wasn't exactly a magic trick. It was just what happened when Ollie got nervous, which was almost always, which meant that almost nobody in the whole wide ocean knew that Ollie was there at all.
